# Security

We take the security of this repository and its associated components seriously. Protecting user data and maintaining a secure environment is of utmost importance to us.

## Reporting Security Issues

**Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.**

Instead, report any security vulnerabilities or concerns through the following methods:
1. Open a new issue in our [GitHub Issues section](https://github.com/gihsgpa/gihsgpa.github.io/issues) with the label `security`.
2. Provide detailed information as outlined below to help us investigate and resolve the issue effectively.

### Information to Include in Your Report:
- **Type of issue**: e.g., buffer overflow, SQL injection, cross-site scripting, etc.
- **Affected files**: Include the full paths or URLs of source files.
- **Location of the vulnerability**: Provide the tag, branch, commit, or direct URL.
- **Special configuration details**: Mention any specific setup required to reproduce the issue.
- **Steps to reproduce**: Outline step-by-step instructions to replicate the vulnerability.
- **Proof-of-concept or exploit code** (if possible).
- **Impact**: Explain how the vulnerability could be exploited and its potential consequences.

You can also review the [Discord Security Page](https://discord.com/security) and [HackerOne Security Policies](https://www.hackerone.com/policy) for best practices in submitting reports and ensuring responsible disclosure.

### Expected Response
Once your report is submitted:
- We will assess and prioritize the issue based on its severity.
- You can expect a response within **48 hours**.
- Follow-up communication may occur to gather additional information or provide updates.

## Preferred Languages

We request that all communications be made in **English** to ensure clarity and efficiency.

## Policy

This repository adheres to the principles of [`Coordinated Vulnerability Disclosure`](<https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/msrc/cvd>) to encourage responsible reporting and collaboration with the community.
